description: Hand-written eval set covering easy lookup, multi-doc synthesis, and out-of-corpus refusal cases. Each item declares: question, expected behaviour (answer | refuse), the doc_ids that should appear in retrieval (gold_doc_ids), and free-text reference notes for LLM-as-judge faithfulness scoring.

items.question: What is the minimum net worth required for an Investment Adviser registered with SEBI?
items.reference_notes: SEBI Investment Advisers Regulations + master circular set net worth requirements (e.g., individual: positive net worth; corporate: INR 50 lakh — confirm against current text).

items.question: Under what circumstances must a Research Analyst register with SEBI as opposed to issuing reports without registration?
items.reference_notes: SEBI Research Analyst Regulations cover thresholds for registration and exemptions for journalists, advisers etc.

items.question: What are the disclosure obligations for a Mutual Fund scheme regarding its expense ratio?
items.reference_notes: Master circular for mutual funds covers TER disclosure on websites, AMFI portals, factsheets.

items.question: How does an FPI register with SEBI and what is the role of a Designated Depository Participant?
items.reference_notes: FPI master circular outlines DDP registration, KYC, application process.

items.question: What is the minimum corpus size for a Category I Alternative Investment Fund?
items.reference_notes: AIF Regulations require minimum corpus of INR 20 crore (general) — verify in current master circular text.

items.question: What are the timelines for a listed entity to disclose price-sensitive information under LODR?
items.reference_notes: Reg 30 of LODR + master circular: 24 hours / 12 hours / immediately depending on category.

items.question: How are unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI) and trading windows defined under SEBI insider trading rules?
items.reference_notes: PIT regulations Reg 2(n) (UPSI) + Reg 9 (Code of Conduct) + master circular.

items.question: What are the restrictions on intra-day buyback in the open market route?
items.reference_notes: Buyback master circular has rules on max 25% of average daily volume, etc.

items.question: What customer due diligence (CDD) measures must banks apply for low-risk customers under RBI's KYC Master Direction?
items.reference_notes: RBI KYC MD differentiates simplified vs enhanced due diligence; low-risk gets reduced documentation.

items.question: What are the maximum loading limits for full-KYC PPIs as per RBI's Master Direction on PPIs?
items.reference_notes: PPI MD: full-KYC PPIs INR 2 lakh outstanding; small PPIs INR 10,000.

items.question: What multi-factor authentication requirements does RBI mandate for digital payment transactions?
items.reference_notes: Digital Payment Security Controls MD requires AFA for transactions above thresholds.

items.question: What is the minimum capital requirement for a base-layer NBFC under the Scale-Based Regulation framework?
items.reference_notes: SBR MD: minimum NOF generally INR 10 crore for NBFC-BL.

items.question: How does the RBI define a microfinance loan and what are the ceilings on household income for borrower eligibility?
items.reference_notes: Microfinance regulatory framework (2022) sets income threshold INR 3 lakh per annum.

items.question: What disclosures must a credit-card issuer make to a customer at the time of issuance under the Credit and Debit Card MD?
items.reference_notes: Card MD: MITC, billing cycle, interest computation, fees, grievance redressal.

items.question: What is the priority sector lending target for foreign banks with 20 or more branches in India?
items.reference_notes: PSL MD: 40% of ANBC for foreign banks with >=20 branches.

items.question: Under the Liberalised Remittance Scheme, what is the per-financial-year limit and what categories of remittance are permitted?
items.reference_notes: LRS limit USD 250,000 per financial year for resident individuals; permitted categories enumerated.

items.question: What approvals are required to raise External Commercial Borrowings (ECB) and what is the all-in-cost ceiling for the automatic route?
items.reference_notes: ECB MD: automatic vs approval routes, AIC ceiling expressed as benchmark + spread.

items.question: How frequently must a SEBI-registered Portfolio Manager report performance to its clients?
items.reference_notes: PMS regulations: monthly reports.

items.question: What is the minimum subscription requirement for a public REIT issue?
items.reference_notes: REIT regulations have minimum subscription thresholds — note these have changed over time.

items.question: What is the minimum public unitholding required for a listed InvIT?
items.reference_notes: InvIT regulations require minimum public unitholding (typically 25%).

items.question: Compare the KYC requirements for opening a bank account with the KYC requirements for issuing a full-KYC PPI.
items.reference_notes: Synthesise across KYC MD and PPI MD.

items.question: How do the disclosure requirements for an Investment Adviser differ from those for a Research Analyst when issuing investment recommendations?
items.reference_notes: IA: fiduciary obligations; RA: distribution restrictions and disclosure of holdings.

items.question: If a Mutual Fund AMC also offers a Portfolio Management Service, what segregation requirements apply across the two activities?
items.reference_notes: Cross-reference between MF and PMS master circulars on Chinese walls / segregation.

items.question: How are Foreign Portfolio Investors and Designated Depository Participants integrated into the depository system?
items.reference_notes: FPI uses DDP for KYC; DP regulations cover account opening for FPIs.

items.question: How do the obligations of a Stock Broker compare to those of a Custodian when handling client securities?
items.reference_notes: Both have segregation, reporting, and reconciliation obligations.

items.question: What is the difference between a NBFC-BL and a NBFC-ML under the Scale-Based Regulation?
items.reference_notes: SBR layers: BL, ML, UL, TL — each has different regulatory expectations.

items.question: What outsourcing risk-management obligations apply to a bank that contracts a cloud provider for core IT services?
items.reference_notes: IT Outsourcing MD + Cyber Security Framework — DD, exit plans, audit rights.

items.question: What is the procedure for a listed company to delist its equity shares voluntarily?
items.reference_notes: Delisting Regulations 2021: reverse book building, exit price.

items.question: What is the role of a Debenture Trustee in a public issue of non-convertible debentures?
items.reference_notes: Debenture Trustee Regulations + NCS regulations on monitoring covenants and asset cover.

items.question: What credit rating disclosure obligations apply to a SEBI-registered Credit Rating Agency?
items.reference_notes: CRA Master Circular: rating actions, default disclosures, conflict-of-interest disclosures.

items.question: What are the eligibility criteria for an entity to act as an Asset Reconstruction Company in India?
items.reference_notes: ARC MD: minimum NOF (currently INR 300 crore), CRAR.

items.question: What is the SEBI process for approving a buyback of securities from the open market through stock exchange route?
items.reference_notes: Buyback Regulations: time limits, escrow, disclosures.

items.question: How is the ICDR offer document structured for a fresh issue, and what are the role of the merchant banker's due diligence?
items.reference_notes: ICDR regulations: DRHP, RHP, prospectus content, MB due diligence certificate.

items.question: What is the recommended exposure limit for a borrower under SEBI-regulated NBFCs?
items.reference_notes: Trick question — NBFCs are RBI-regulated, not SEBI-regulated. The system should refuse and clarify the regulatory mismatch rather than confabulate.

items.question: What does the SEBI Master Circular on Mutual Funds say about cryptocurrency trading by AMCs?
items.reference_notes: Out of corpus / out of regulatory scope. The system should refuse and not invent rules.

items.question: Should I invest my retirement savings in a Category III AIF?
items.reference_notes: Personal financial advice — system must refuse and direct to a licensed adviser.

items.question: What is the GDP growth forecast for India in 2026?
items.reference_notes: Out of regulatory scope, not in any document. Refuse.

items.question: How does RBI's Liberalised Remittance Scheme interact with FEMA reporting on Form A2?
items.reference_notes: LRS MD references Form A2 for outward remittance reporting at AD banks.

items.question: What specific cyber-security incident reporting timelines does the RBI mandate for scheduled commercial banks?
items.reference_notes: Cyber Security Framework: report unusual cyber incidents to RBI within prescribed timeframes.

items.question: What are the obligations of a SEBI-registered Custodian regarding daily client-asset reconciliation?
items.reference_notes: Custodian master circular sets reconciliation cadence and reporting.
